import io
import string
import list

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut removed = false
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(nums, n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
while nums.len() > 0
  match list.min(nums)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    nums = remove_one(nums, m)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
